mapper.select: select t.*, s.session_no, o.order_no from service_ticket t left join chat_session s on t.session_id=s.id left join demo_order o on t.order_id=o.id where t.id=#{id} and t.deleted=0

select t.*, s.session_no, o.order_no from service_ticket t left join chat_session s on t.session_id=s.id left join demo_order o on t.order_id=o.id where t.session_id=#{sessionId} and t.deleted=0 order by t.created_at desc, t.id desc

select t.*, s.session_no, o.order_no from service_ticket t left join chat_session s on t.session_id=s.id left join demo_order o on t.order_id=o.id where t.session_id=#{sessionId} and t.deleted=0 and t.status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING') order by t.created_at desc, t.id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into service_ticket(ticket_no, session_id, message_id, order_id, user_id, intent_code, priority, status, customer_issue, ai_summary, suggested_action, assigned_to) values(#{ticketNo}, #{sessionId}, #{messageId}, #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{intentCode}, coalesce(#{priority}, 'NORMAL'), coalesce(#{status}, 'PENDING'), #{customerIssue}, #{aiSummary}, #{suggestedAction}, #{assignedTo})
mapper.update: update service_ticket set priority=#{priority}, status=#{status}, customer_issue=#{customerIssue}, ai_summary=#{aiSummary}, suggested_action=#{suggestedAction}, assigned_to=#{assignedTo}, resolved_at=case when #{status} in ('RESOLVED', 'CLOSED') then coalesce(#{resolvedAt}, now()) else #{resolvedAt} end where id=#{id} and deleted=0
update service_ticket set deleted=1 where id=#{id}
